youtube.description:
GREETINGS, FELLOW LARPERS!

My name is Larpturian. I seek out adventures wherever they may be found, from Minecraft to Mario I am always looking to make the most out of every experience, and hopefully, in the end, it'll be a tale worth telling.

My siblings, LarplessGoomba, ImmortalLarpai, and Larpany Frye accompany me on my quest through the world of gaming.

Join the adventure, and see how deep this tale goes.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/larpturiantale?igsh=MWdlN2FmeWJsbmZl&utm_source=qr
